title: Israel Passes Law to Hang Palestinians Convicted of Deadly Attacks
summary_full: Experts say the law was written in such a way as to ensure that it was unlikely to ever apply to Jewish extremists who commit similar crimes.
summary_public: Experts say the law was written in such a way as to ensure that it was unlikely to ever apply to Jewish extremists who commit similar crimes.
